src/main/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Remove JHipster-specific documentation and needle comments that are no longer needed or relevant.
Replace manual constructor injection with Lombok's @RequiredArgsConstructor to reduce boilerplate.
Remove @Profile annotation to allow the configuration to be active in all profiles, including test profiles.
Replace mutable HashMap initialization with immutable Map.of() factory method.
Remove unused imports for Collections and HashMap.
Refactor toAnsiString method to remove redundant string argument.
Refactor EnableJpaRepositories annotation to use named attributes for clarity and to specify a custom repository base class.
Add import for the new repository base class used in the configuration.
Add @NonNull annotation to the FormatterRegistry parameter in addFormatters method.
Replace explicit generic type arguments in anonymous inner class instantiation with diamond operator.
Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports for better code clarity and to resolve potential ambiguity.
Update import path for SpaWebFilter to reflect package restructuring.
Add import for AbstractHttpConfigurer required for the new lambda-based configuration style.
Add import for Lombok's RequiredArgsConstructor annotation.
Replace manual constructor injection with Lombok's @RequiredArgsConstructor annotation.
Update CSRF configuration to use method reference instead of lambda for cleaner syntax.
Reformat authorization rules to use multi-line arguments for better readability.

Add import for the new Java 17+ serial annotation.

Apply Lombok @Data annotation to generate getters, setters, equals, hashCode, and toString.
Remove SuppressWarnings annotation as duplicated blocks are handled by Lombok generation.
